Question: A two-dimensional, conservative force is zero on the x - and y -axes, and satisfies the condition $$( d F_{x} \text{/} d y ) = ( d F_{y} \text{/} d x ) = ( 4 \text{N/m}^{3} ) x y$$ . What is the magnitude of the force at the point $$x = y = 1 \text{m?}$$
Find the forces on the particle in Example 8.6 when its kinetic energy is 1.0 J at $$x = 0 .$$
